name: Roasted Veggie Tacos
recipeIngredient: 6 Italian Plum tomatoes, cut into 1/2 inch wedges
2 small green bell peppers, cut into 1/2 inch wide strips
2 medium onions, cut into 1/2 inch thick wedges
3 to 4 tablespoons olive or veg. oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one oven rack in the bottom position and heat the oven to 475 degrees.
2. Spread tomatoes, bell peppers, and onions in an ungreased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
3. Drizzle with oil; toss to coat.
4. Sprinkle with taco seasoning; toss to evenly coat.
5. Bake for about 15 minutes or until the bell peppers and onions are crisp-tender.
6. Meanwhile, spread 2 tablespoons of refried beans on half of the inside of each taco shell.
7. Arrange the taco shells on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Place the tray in the middle oven rack with the vegetables.
9. Bake for an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until tacos are warmed and vegetables are tender.
10. To serve, spoon about 1/3 cup vegetable mixture over refried beans in each shell.
11. Serve with taco sauce and/or salsa.
